name: marriage-card-website
description: Static wedding invitation site with a tiny build step for name orientation.

scripts.watch: npx nodemon --watch src --watch js --watch css --watch site.config.mjs --watch build.js --ignore js/app/couple.mjs --ext html,mjs,js,css --exec 'node build.js'
scripts.start: npx concurrently -n build,serve -c cyan,green "npm run watch" "npm run serve"
scripts.start:kinetic: WEDDING_THEME=kinetic npx concurrently -n build,serve -c cyan,green "npm run watch" "npm run serve"
